The '''Battle of Commenor''' took place during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] objective was to contain [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] forces, not to occupy the world.

==The battle==
During the battle, elements of the [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Third Fleet]] launched a cloaked [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] at Commenor. Pilots [[Caregg Oldathan]] and [[Danen]] of [[Grayfeather Squadron]] investigated and discovered it.

Realizing they could not hope to prevent it from colliding with their world, they pursued the ships responsible for the attack, hoping to exact vengeance and prevent the tactic from being used again.

==Aftermath==
The atrocity committed in the battle resulted in the Commenorians releasing the [[affliceria]] bacterium on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] which infected many civilians and military personnel.

{{Battle-stub}}
